name: V-6 (after 1-3 of Nat. Turn)
preceding_figure_names: Closed Impetus, Fish Tail, Forward Lock, Four Quick Run, Hover Corte, Natural Spin Turn, Progressive Chasse, Progressive Chasse To Right, Quarter Turn to Right, Running Finish, Tipple Chasse To Right, Tipsy To L
